blocks.text:
Convert a real coding session into semantic compression.
Pipeline: session -> HAIL compact -> semantic summary.
Return JSON only (no markdown, no prose outside JSON):
{
"changes": "overall code change summary",
"auth_security": "auth/security change summary or 'none detected'",
"layer_file_changes": [
{"layer":"presentation|application|domain|infrastructure|tests|docs|config", "summary":"layer change summary", "files":["path"]}
]
}
Rules:
- Use only facts from HAIL_COMPACT.
- Mention what was modified.
- If no auth/security-related change exists, set auth_security to "none detected".
- In layer_file_changes, include changed files grouped by architectural layer.
- Keep output compact and factual.
- Use the same language as the session signals when obvious.
- Input source mode: session_only. Summarize only from session event signals.
- Response style: standard. Keep each field short but informative (1-2 sentences).
- Output shape: layered. Group file changes by architecture layer in layer_file_changes.
HAIL_COMPACT={"auth_security_signals":[],"file_changes":[],"git_context":{},"layer_rollup":[],"session":{"event_count":2,"files_changed":0,"id":"summary-auto","lines_added":0,"lines_removed":0,"message_count":1,"model":"claude-opus-4-6","provider":"anthropic","task_count":0,"title":"summary-auto","tool":"claude-code"},"summary_source":"session_events","timeline_signals":["user: hello"]}
{"changes":"No code or configuration changes were made in this session; HAIL_COMPACT reports 0 files changed and 0 lines added/removed.","auth_security":"none detected","layer_file_changes":[]}

data.summary: {"changes":"No code or configuration changes were made in this session; HAIL_COMPACT reports 0 files changed and 0 lines added/removed.","auth_security":"none detected","layer_file_changes":[]}
